title: Watch: Why is there a 'black cloud' over unity at the Nato summit?
summary_full: US President Donald Trump has used the Nato summit to criticise the lack of support for his war on Iran, and revive his interest in taking over Greenland.
summary_public: US President Donald Trump has used the Nato summit to criticise the lack of support for his war on Iran, and revive his interest in taking over Greenland.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: criticise the lack of support for his war on Iran
